text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, me? I'm fine! I just hurt myself a little...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, back to training! Sorry for worrying you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Mejiro Ryan is cheerful as ever, an injury
is still an injury.
choice_data_list: We should take a break, just to be safe.
Forget about the pain and stay focused!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-but it's really not a big deal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Look! See how easy I can do squats?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ryan attempts a squat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ngh, okay... Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah... You're right! Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If this were a bad injury, I wouldn't be able to
race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(McQueen would've never let this happen to
herself.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm still not as aware of my body as I need
to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We agree to stick to rest and recovery that day,
but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My fears come true, and Ryan's injury isn't healing
as fast as I'd hoped.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Focus... focus! At a time like this, I gotta use my
abdominal muscles to breathe from my
diaphragm!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... and out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish training, but it looks like Ryan will make
a full recovery by tomorrow.
